description: Automatically manages frontmatter tags from Obsidian folder paths. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.description: Automatically manages frontmatter tags from folder paths.
manifest.name: Ishibashi Auto Tagger

name: Ishibashi Auto Tagger

releases.author: ishibashi-c
releases.description: Fixes the manifest description to satisfy the community plugin review requirement by removing the redundant product name.
releases.name: Ishibashi Auto Tagger 1.0.1

releases.author: ishibashi-c
releases.description: Initial public release. Automatically manages folder-derived frontmatter tags while preserving unrelated manual tags. Includes Japanese and English settings, explicit settings save controls, numeric ordering-prefix cleanup, tag previews, exclusions, archive handling, and a reviewed legacy-tag repair workflow.
releases.name: Ishibashi Auto Tagger 1.0.0
